title: KORBOND Sewing Pins - Glass Headed Fabric Pins - 100 Pins - 3cm Length
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
Korbond high quality sewing pins Crafted from tempered steel, Ideal for general sewing purposes, tailoring and alterations
Glass heads produced in a variety of bright colours, making the pins easily visible in the fabric and on the floor if dropped
Pack contains 10g (approximately 100 pieces) 1-inch glass headed sewing pins and a handy carry case to store them safely
A great, traditional alternative to sewing clips
description: From the manufacturer KORBOND CARE & REPAIR Professional Glass headed Pins Available Now More products from KORBOND CARE & REPAIR Craft Buttons Fastening Pack Berry Pins Retractable Tape Measure KORBOND CARE & REPAIR Professional Glass headed Pins Korbond Professional Glass Headed Pins are conveniently packed in a small case and come in a variety of colours. The glass headed pins withstand heat and therefore can be ironed over. With extra strong metal shafts to withstand the thickest of materials they are excellent for dressmakers and home sewers alike. Contents Include: 10g extra strong glass headed pins Handy Usages For KORBOND CARE & REPAIR Professional Glass Headed Pins Professional crafting Use different coloured pins to visually differentiate between the cut-out sections of a pattern. Perfect for quilters and other crafts where small sections of material need to be easily identifiable. Marking out button holes Glass Headed Pins make excellent visual aids for accurately marking out button holes on clothing and soft furnishings. Floral designs Add a touch of colour when pinning a poppy, or use the glass heads to create detail when decorating the binding on a bouquet. Kids craft Stick four Glass Headed Pins into the top of a cotton reel to make a home made French Knitting Doll.
